name: Chocolate Chiefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add the granulated sugar replacement.
3. Mix in the vanilla extract and skim milk.
4. Add the melted baking chocolate, salt, and hazelnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased, paper-lined 11 x 17-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and cut into 1-inch squares.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 squares - 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE CALORIES; 2 SQUARES: 29 (SAY WHAT)
